001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.ColumnInfo;
004
005public class BatchEggAggregate {
006
007  @ColumnInfo(name = "batchId")
008  private long batchId;
009
010  @ColumnInfo(name = "totalCount")
011  private int totalCount;
012
013  @ColumnInfo(name = "viableCount")
014  private int viableCount;
015
016  public long getBatchId() { return batchId; }
017  public void setBatchId(long batchId) { this.batchId = batchId; }
018
019  public int getTotalCount() { return totalCount; }
020  public void setTotalCount(int totalCount) { this.totalCount = totalCount; }
021
022  public int getViableCount() { return viableCount; }
023  public void setViableCount(int viableCount) { this.viableCount = viableCount; }
024}
